$metadata.description: xstockstrat component manifest — maps each shared UI component to its variants, sizes, and the services that use it. All components follow the shadcn/ui pattern (Radix UI + CVA + Tailwind).

xstockstrat-trader.role: Trading UI — order entry, order book, portfolio summary, live alerts

xstockstrat-insights.role: Analytics & insights dashboard — strategy scores, backtesting results, charts

xstockstrat-config-ui.role: Config management — live config values by environment and trading mode, audit log

AppShell.description: Top-level layout with sticky header, cross-service navigation and optional right-side action slot. Present in all three services.

Button.description: Primary interactive element. Built with CVA, supports asChild via Radix Slot.

variant.ghost: No background, hover fills accent — hover:bg-accent
variant.link: Text-only with underline on hover — text-primary

Badge.description: Status / label pill. Rounded-full. No interactive states.

variant.live: bg-buy/20 text-buy — alias for buy mode

Card.description: Container surface with border, rounded corners and card background token. Composed of sub-components.

subComponents.Card: rounded-xl border border-border bg-card text-card-foreground shadow-sm

Input.description: Text input field. Styled to match the dark theme (--input border + background).

Select.description: Accessible dropdown select built on Radix UI Select primitive.

Separator.description: Horizontal or vertical visual divider. Used in AppShell header and forms.

Sheet.description: Slide-in panel (drawer). Used for mobile navigation in AppShell.

Table.description: Data table. Used in OrderBook and config table views.

OrderForm.description: Buy/sell order entry form. Integrates with xstockstrat-trading gRPC via Connect-RPC.

OrderBook.description: Live order list and portfolio summary card. Polls xstockstrat-trading + xstockstrat-portfolio.

subComponents.OrderBook: Scrollable table of open/filled orders with status badges
subComponents.PortfolioSummary: Card showing total equity, cash, P&L with buy/sell colour coding

AlertStream.description: Server-Sent Events (SSE) alert badge in the header. Connects to xstockstrat-notify via /api/alerts/stream.

ModeToggle.description: PAPER / LIVE toggle in the top-right header actions. Controls TradingMode state.

StrategyList.description: Grid/list of scored strategies. Fetched from xstockstrat-analysis.

StrategyDetail.description: Full backtest results page with lightweight-charts price chart.

ConfigTable.description: Editable table of config key-value pairs. Scoped by environment + trading_mode dropdowns.

AuditLog.description: Read-only append-only audit trail of config changes. Queries ledger schema via pg.
